tagline: Where artistry meets technique. Your best look starts here.
walkInPolicy: Walk-ins are welcome based on availability. For the best experience, we recommend booking ahead — especially for color services and weekends.
parking: Street parking available on Style Ave and adjacent blocks. The Atlantic Terminal garage is a 5-minute walk.

about.headline: More Than a Salon
paragraphs: Founded in 2018, Luxe Salon was born from a simple belief: a great haircut changes everything. Not just how you look — how you carry yourself, how you feel walking into a room.

Our founder, Maya Chen, spent a decade working in top salons across New York before opening Luxe in the heart of Brooklyn. She built a space where creativity, technique, and genuine hospitality come together.

Today, our team of specialists brings decades of combined experience to every client. Whether it's a precision cut, a bold color transformation, or wedding-day styling, we approach every service as an art form.
about.philosophy: We believe a great haircut changes everything.
about.philosophySub: Every client deserves to leave feeling like the best version of themselves. We listen first, then create.
about.productsDescription: We partner exclusively with brands that share our commitment to quality and sustainability. Every product in our salon is carefully selected for performance and ingredient integrity.

team.name: Maya Chen
team.title: Founder & Color Specialist
team.bio: Maya's philosophy is simple: color should look like it grew out of your head. Her hand-painted techniques have earned a loyal following across Brooklyn.
team.signature: Dimensional brunettes that catch the light just right.

team.name: Theo Rivera
team.title: Master Barber
team.bio: Trained in classic barbering with a modern edge, Theo brings precision and artistry to every cut. His clean fades are legendary in the neighborhood.
team.signature: The kind of fade that makes strangers ask for your barber.

team.name: Priya Nakamura
team.title: Texture Expert
team.bio: Priya specializes in working with natural texture — curls, coils, and waves. She's a DevaCurl-certified stylist who celebrates every curl pattern.
team.signature: Curls that bounce, shine, and behave.

team.name: Leo Moretti
team.title: Bridal & Events Specialist
team.bio: With 15 years in editorial and bridal, Leo creates styles that photograph beautifully and last all night. He's styled looks for Vogue, ELLE, and over 200 weddings.
team.signature: Updos that survive the last dance.

items.name: Men's Haircut
items.desc: Precision cut with hot towel finish

items.name: Color Correction
items.desc: Fix or transform previous color work

items.name: Keratin Smoothing
items.desc: Frizz reduction for up to 3 months

items.name: The Full Experience
items.desc: Cut, beard, shave, and scalp massage

reviews.name: Samira K.
reviews.text: Best salon experience I've ever had. Maya transformed my hair and my confidence.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.text: Theo gives the cleanest fade in Brooklyn. Period. Don't go anywhere else.

reviews.name: Elena W.
reviews.text: Finally found a salon that actually listens. My balayage came out exactly how I imagined.

cta.headline: Ready for a fresh look?
cta.subtext: Your best hair is one appointment away. Book today and let us take care of the rest.
